name: Survival Analysis and Reporting
preprompt: Specify the analysis plan for median lifespan comparison, including Kaplan-Meier estimation, log-rank testing or equivalent survival comparison, censoring handling, effect size reporting, and any sensitivity analyses. State how results, exclusions, and deviations will be summarized for reporting.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Turns the survival data into a pre-specified, analysis-ready result package.
